title: Uhlelo Lwe-Affiliate
attention: Lolu hlelo lwe-affiliate alukhona ukuze ulukele "amalungu omndeni" noma "amakhasimende." Sicela ufunde {faqLink} ngaphambi kokuqhubeka.
earnDescription: Ngokufaka isixhumanisi se-InterServer kuwebhusayithi yakho, uzothola ikhomishini ethi {amount} ngokuthengiswa okusha ngayinye esivela ekuxhumana kwesixhumanisi kuwebhusayithi yakho.
shareUrl: Yabelana ne-URL yakho eyodwa ye-affiliate nabangane

status.title: Isimo
status.defaultDesc: Ikhasimende libhalisiwe ngaphansi kwe-affiliate kodwa alikafinyeleli izidingo.
status.pendingDesc: Ikhasimende lihlangabezene nezidingo zesikhathi nenkokhelo, limlindela ukuqinisekiswa ngumlawuli.
status.failedDesc: Ikhasimende alihlangananga nezidingo noma i-affiliate yahlukana nemigomo ekutholeni ikhasimende.

paymentSetup.title: Ukuhlela Inkokhelo
paymentSetup.choosePayment: Khetha lokho ofuna ukukwenzelwa ngezinkokhelo zakho ze-affiliate
paymentSetup.createPrepay: Dala i-PrePay enezinani ukuze isetshenziselwe izinweba zami ngokuzenzakalelayo.

webTrafficPage.title: Izivakashi Zamuva Ze-Webhu
webTrafficPage.noTraffic: Ayikho izivakashi ze-affiliate ezamuva ezihambelana nokusesha
webTrafficPage.loadInNewTab: Layisha ikhasi kuthebhu elisha (qaphela ngamakhukhi ashiywayo)
webTrafficPage.viewInNewTab: Buka Ikhasi Kuthebhu Elisha (qaphela ngamakhukhi ashiywayo)

viewBanners.title: Amabhanela
viewBanners.bannerNote: Ngezelela ulwazi mayelana nebhanelahanisi njengekhodi ye-HTML, usayizi wesithombe, njll., chofoza kunoma yisiphi isithombe sebhanelahanisi ofuna ukusisebenzisa kuwebhusayithi yakho.

dockSetup.title: Ukuhlela I-Dock
dockSetup.couponTooltip: Uma ikhasimende elisha lisebenzisa leli khuponi, lizobhalwa njengelo olutshelwe nguwe futhi lizobalwa njengokuthengiswa kwe-affiliate.
dockSetup.descriptionPlaceholder: Sebenzisa leli khuponi uma unika umyalelo ukuze uthole inyanga yokuqala yehosithinge ngo-1 ukheshi kuphela.

faqPage.title: Imibuzo Evame Ukubuzwa
faqPage.a1: Sikhokha ikhomishini eqondile ethi $100 ngokuthengiswa ngakunye, futhi lolu hlelo lwe-affiliate lukhokha kakhulu.
faqPage.q2: 2. Kuthatha isikhathi esingakanani ukuze ukuthengiswa kubonakale ku-akhawunti yami?
faqPage.a3_step2: Ngasohlangothini lwesokunxele phansi uzobona inketho ethi Buka Ikhasi Le-Affiliate.
faqPage.a3_step3: Lapha ungabona zonke izikhomishini zakho ezilindile nezagunyaziwe.
faqPage.q4: 4. Ngiyazi umuntu odinga ihosithinge. Ngizuziswa kanjani?
faqPage.a4_step2: Skrolela phansi ukuze ubone isixhumanisi sakho se-affiliate.
faqPage.a4_step3: Thumela lesi sixhumanisi kumuntu wakho odinga ihosithinge.
faqPage.a4_step4: Uma bechofoza kuleso sixhumanisi bese benika umyalelo ne-akhawunti yethu, uthola ikhomishini.
faqPage.q5: 5. Sengigunyaziwe uhlelo lwe-affiliate le-InterServer Hosting. Manje ngenzani?
faqPage.a5_step1: Ngena ku-akhawunti yakho ye-affiliate ukuze ufinyelele izinto zokumaketha ze-InterServer ngokuchofoza i-tab ethi Amabhanela Nezixhumanisi.
faqPage.a5_step2: Khetha izinto zokumaketha ofuna ukuzifaka kuwebhusayithi yakho.
faqPage.a5_step3: Uzobona amakhodi amabhanela ngasohlangothini lwesokudla lamabhanela onke; khopisha futhi ubeke leli khodi kuwebhusayithi yakho.
faqPage.a5_step4: Uma umuntu echofoza kuleso sixhumanisi bese bethenga i-akhawunti yehosithinge, uthola ikhomishini.
faqPage.a6_line1: Yebo, kodwa sicela ungabidishi ngebizo lethu lenkampani, ukushintshwa kwegama lethu lenkampani, amaphutha okubhala, noma noma yiliphi izwi elinezingxenye zalo kufaka phakathi InterServer, InterServer Hosting.
faqPage.a6_line2: Gxila ezinzeni zamagama afana nehosithinge elinejubane, ihosithinge ye-PHP, ihosithinge ye-WordPress.
faqPage.a6_line3: Sicela uxhumane nathi uma udinga usizo ekucabangeni amagama.
faqPage.a6_line4: Qiniseka ukufaka InterServer, InterServer Hosting, InterServer.net, InterServer web hosting njengamagama ekhempeni eliyingxenye.
faqPage.a7_line1: Ngemuva kwezinsuku ezingu-90 ukuthengiswa okusebenzayo kuzoshintsha isimo sakho kusuka ku-Default ukuya ku-Pending.
faqPage.a7_line2: Uma ukuthengiswa kulindile, kuyokhokhelwa ezinsukwini ezingu-7 zokuqala zenyanga.
faqPage.a8_line1: Kungaba nezizathu ezimbalwa zalokhu. Ngezinye izikhathi sidinga isikhathi esanele ukuze siqinisekise ukuthengiswa.
faqPage.a8_line2: Into enula ukuyihlola ukuqiniseka ukuthi indlela yakho yokukhokha isethelwe.
faqPage.q9: 9. Izithengiso/izikhomishini zami zihlala zilindile isikhathi esingakanani ngaphambi kokuthi zigunyazwe?
faqPage.q10: 10. Ngingasebenzisa isixhumanisi sami se-affiliate sokuzikhokhelela ku-akhawunti engizozisebenzisela ukusebenzisa kwami mathupha?
faqPage.a10: Cha. Noma yikuphi ukuxhumana ne-akhawunti ethengisiwe kuzophumela ekuhlulekeni ngokuzenzakalelayo kokuthengiswa.
faqPage.a11_intro: Yenqatshiwe kusho ukuthi ikhomishini yehlulekile ngokuphelele.
faqPage.a11_reason2: Indlela efanayo yokukhokha isetshenziswe ne-akhawunti enye.
faqPage.a11_reason3: Uhlelo lwathola ukuthi wena, i-affiliate, naye usebenzisa i-akhawunti yekhasimende.
faqPage.a11_policy: Njengoba inkokhelo yethu ethi $100 ngokuthengiswa ngakunye ivame kuba kakhulu kunale esikhulule ekhasimendeni ngisho ngemuva konyaka owodwa, sinomgomo oqinile wokubamba imilukelo engahlangabezani neziqondiso zethu. Uma ulukela umngane noma ikhasimende, mnika nje isixhumanisi noma ikhuponi. Ungabelani ngezinhlobo zokukhokha futhi ungasebenzisi i-akhawunti.
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Sicela uphinde ubuyele emgomweni wethu we-affiliate lapha:
faqPage.q12: 12. Ngingumklami/umthuthukisi futhi ngilukela amakhasimende. Kulungile yini lokho?
faqPage.a12_line1: Leli goso ngeke lisebenze kithi (noma nanoma yiluphi enye uhlelo lwe-affiliate lehosithinge). Uma kukhona izifanekiso ezenziwe ku-akhawunti eziningi, izikhomishini zihluleka.
faqPage.a12_line2: Lokhu kwenzelwa ukuvimbela umuntu ofanayo ukubhalisa nokwenza imali kuhlelo lethu lwe-affiliate ngokuzikhokhelela.
faqPage.a12_line3: Ungacabanga ukugcina amakhasimende ngokuqondile ubakhokhise wena uqobo kusetshenziswa into efana ne-PayPal. Ungakhetha i-akhawunti yehosithinge yokuthengisa kuthi futhi uqale.
